requirements.title: Enhanced DBS
notes: Physical DBS expiry is three years, but policy requires annual review.
Candidate can carry this forward across placements.

requirements.title: Right to Work
notes: Profile-scoped evidence should carry forward cleanly.
Review confirms nothing material has changed.

requirements.title: Client induction pack
notes: Placement-specific paperwork for the trust or framework.
Must be completed again for a new placement.

requirements.title: Trust-specific training variance
notes: Client may accept an intentional waiver with audit trail while a renewal course is booked.
Used to model TXM case-by-case sign-off.
